channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Nintendo Indie World Showcase set for March 3
item.content:encoded:
• Switch
  • Switch 2

Updates on indie games coming to Switch 2 and Switch.

Nintendo will host an Indie World Showcase on March 3 at 6:00 a.m. PT / 9:00 a.m. ET featuring roughly 15 minutes of news and updates on independent games coming to Switch 2 and Switch, the company announced. You will be able to watch it on YouTube (Americas, Europe, Japan) and Twitch.

Stay tuned.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/nintendo-indie-world-showcase-set-for-march-3
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Rumor: Starfield coming to PS5 on April 7
item.content:encoded:
• PS5

Pre-orders reportedly opening on March 18.

Publisher Bethesda Softworks and developer Bethesda Game Studio will release a PlayStation 5 version of Starfield on April 7, according to reliable leaker Billbil-kun.

The PlayStation 5 version will reportedly be available in both standard and Premium editions, including at physical retail. Pre-orders are said to be opening on March 18.

Starfield first launched for Xbox Series and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store on September 6, 2023.

Here is a brief overview of the game, via Bethesda Softworks:

Starfield is the first new universe in 25 years from Bethesda Game Studios, the award-winning creators of The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim and Fallout 4. In this next generation role-playing game set amongst the stars, create any character you want and explore with unparalleled freedom as you embark on an epic journey to answer humanity’s greatest mystery.

The year is 2330. Humanity has ventured beyond our solar system, settling new planets, and living as a spacefaring people. From humble beginnings as a space miner, you will join Constellation—the last group of space explorers seeking rare artifacts throughout the galaxy—and navigate the vast expanse of the Settled Systems in Bethesda Game Studios’ biggest and most ambitious game.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/rumor-starfield-coming-to-ps5-on-april-7
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Moonlight Peaks launches July 7 for Switch 2, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

Gothic life simulation game dated.

Gothic life simulation game Moonlight Peaks will launch for Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam and Google Play Games on July 7, publishers XSEED Games and Marvelous Europe, and developer Little Chicken Game Company announced. Further information, including pricing, will be announced at a later date.

Here is an overview of the game, via XSEED Games and Marvelous Europe:

About

Sometimes you look in the mirror and know it’s time for a change—even if you can’t see your own reflection. Life as a vampire is hard enough, but it’s even harder when your father is Count Dracula and he expects you to carry on his dark legacy. But you have a different dream: a life of compassion, creativity, and maybe a little bit of farming. So, you pack your coffin and set off to your family’s abandoned homestead in the supernatural town of Moonlight Peaks. It’s the perfect place to step out of your father’s shadow, cultivate a magical garden, and prove that the undead can still live a wholesome life.

Experience life as a vampire in a magical town full of werewolves, witches, mermaids, and more in Moonlight Peaks! In this heartwarming, supernatural life-sim, you set out to show your skeptical father that a life of compassion is possible – even for the undead. Make friends with the other local creatures of the night and perhaps find eternal love in the mystical dating scene. Settle down in your family’s haunted cottage, customizing it to suit your own sense of gothic style. Embrace immortality and unlock ancient abilities, master potion brewing, and expand your grimoire of spells, all in the name of a more bountiful harvest. Unravel the mysteries of the seven families that inhabit Moonlight Peaks and bring a bit of light back to this spooky settlement. Just remember to be back in your coffin before the sun comes up!

  • ❮
  • ❯

Key Features

  • Live! A Sweet and Spooky Journey – Customize the perfect vampire persona and build relationships with the people of Moonlight Peaks to learn more about the town’s history. Uncover the secrets of the seven families who dwell there – and maybe even find “tomb” love from any of the two dozen romanceable characters in the process.
  • Run! A Farm Full of Magic Crops and Livestock – Design a custom cozy gothic homestead, turning a forgotten farm into the ideal sanctuary. Obtain new tools and develop the property to grow even more enchanted crops and raise magical livestock.
  • Behold! Mythical Powers You Can Wield – Embrace a supernatural lineage! Shapeshift into other forms to explore all the town has to offer, and study witchcraft to learn spells that will help on the farm or when gathering resources.
  • Beware! Delightfully Dark Diversions – Beyond the farm, enjoy fishing, foraging, and potion-crafting, along with activities like embroidering, flower arranging, and more. Players can even collect cards for the town’s favorite game, Nokturna, to play against other residents.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/moonlight-peaks-launches-july-7-for-switch-2-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
